senses.gloss: The nineteenth letter of the Arabic alphabet, written in the Arabic script; preceded by ع (ʕ) and followed by ف (f).
The twenty-eighth and last numeral symbol of the Arabic alphabet (traditional abjad order, used for list numbering), written in the Arabic script; preceded by ظ (ẓ).

etymology.text: Derived from ع (ʕ), and originally written as such (in rasm) by analogy with Nabatean tradition, as Nabatean cognates of Arabic words with /ɣ/ were indiscriminately spelled using 𐢗 (ʿ).
